body:
I see some timeouts at https://github.com/Svetozar-Technologies/indian-law/actions/runs/25607344338/job/75171430969 - check here for example.

If the law was already downloaded to repository and is ready to be displayed in catalog, we should not try to refresh it for another month, yet if we didn't download some parts previously we should continue downloading them on each release or manual trigger, so the sync is automatic, and only for yet unsynced data. We should never execute CI/CD actions for more than 2 hours (total limit is 6 hours, but it is better to be safe), so if limit exceeded we should commit partial result, that will be continued next time.

Also we need to check https://law.satyavera.in/indian-law for correctness, false positives and so on, so all the data is real, and for each law we have not only short description in markdown, but also the full text accessible via the repository, meaning no load on government services, while we use our application/website.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Double check we don't download already downloaded and processed laws for minimum of a month
